title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You hear two friends discussing a present for their teacher.
extracts.audio_script: Man: We need to choose something for Mrs Jones before Friday. Some people suggested flowers, but they won't last very long. || Woman: True. What about a box of chocolates? || Man: She told us she is trying not to eat sweet things. || Woman: Then [8]let's get a photo frame and put the class picture inside it[/8]. It feels more personal, and everyone can sign the card. || Man: Great, I'll buy it after school. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: We need to choose something for Mrs Jones before Friday. Some people suggested flowers, but they won't last very long.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: True. What about a box of chocolates?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: She told us she is trying not to eat sweet things.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Then let's get a photo frame and put the class picture inside it. It feels more personal, and everyone can sign the card.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Great, I'll buy it after school. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: What present do they decide to buy?
questions.explanation: The woman suggests buying a photo frame with the class picture inside, and the man agrees.

extracts.context: You hear an announcement in a library.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: Good afternoon. This is a message for students using the library today. The computers on the first floor are working again after this morning's problem. However, the quiet room is closed because new shelves are being put in. || Speaker: [9]If you need to print anything, please use the desk beside the information counter, not the machines near the entrance[/9]. Staff will help if you have difficulties. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Good afternoon. This is a message for students using the library today. The computers on the first floor are working again after this morning's problem. However, the quiet room is closed because new shelves are being put in.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: If you need to print anything, please use the desk beside the information counter, not the machines near the entrance. Staff will help if you have difficulties. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

questions.question: Where should students go to print documents?
questions.explanation: The announcement says students should print at the desk beside the information counter.

extracts.context: You hear a girl talking to her brother about a school trip.
extracts.audio_script: Girl: Have you packed for tomorrow's trip? Mum put your lunch in the fridge. || Boy: I packed my lunch and my notebook. Do I need money for the museum shop? || Girl: Only if you want something extra. [10]The teacher said the most important thing is to wear comfortable shoes, because we'll be standing for nearly two hours[/10]. Don't wear your new trainers if they hurt. || Boy: Good point. I'll choose my old ones. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Have you packed for tomorrow's trip? Mum put your lunch in the fridge.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I packed my lunch and my notebook. Do I need money for the museum shop?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Only if you want something extra. The teacher said the most important thing is to wear comfortable shoes, because we'll be standing for nearly two hours. Don't wear your new trainers if they hurt.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Good point. I'll choose my old ones. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: What is the boy advised to take special care with?
questions.explanation: The girl says the most important thing is to wear comfortable shoes because they will be standing for a long time.

extracts.context: You hear two friends talking about a new phone.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Is that your new phone? The camera looks much better than your old one. || Man: It is, but I didn't buy it for the camera. My old phone took good pictures. || Woman: Was the screen broken then? || Man: No. [11]I changed it because the battery only lasted until lunchtime, even when I hardly used it[/11]. This one lasts almost two days, which is much easier for college. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Is that your new phone? The camera looks much better than your old one.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: It is, but I didn't buy it for the camera. My old phone took good pictures.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Was the screen broken then?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: No. I changed it because the battery only lasted until lunchtime, even when I hardly used it. This one lasts almost two days, which is much easier for college. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: Why did the man buy a new phone?
questions.explanation: The man says he changed phone because the old battery only lasted until lunchtime.

extracts.context: You hear a woman talking to a friend about a cooking course.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How was your first cooking class? Did you make that bread you wanted to learn? || Woman: Not this week. We made soup, which sounded boring at first. || Man: Was it useful? || Woman: Very. [12]I learned how to cut vegetables properly, and it made everything quicker and safer[/12]. The teacher said bread comes later. I also liked meeting people who are beginners like me. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How was your first cooking class? Did you make that bread you wanted to learn?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Not this week. We made soup, which sounded boring at first.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Was it useful?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Very. I learned how to cut vegetables properly, and it made everything quicker and safer. The teacher said bread comes later. I also liked meeting people who are beginners like me. Let's check the details again later and tell the others as well, because it will be easier if everyone knows the plan before the day.

questions.question: What did the woman learn in the class?
questions.explanation: She says she learned how to cut vegetables properly, which made cooking quicker and safer.

extracts.context: You hear a man giving a radio review of a film.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: I saw the new adventure film last night. The story is simple, and older viewers may guess the ending quite early. Some of the jokes also feel a little old-fashioned. || Speaker: However, [13]the young actor who plays the main character is excellent and makes even quiet scenes interesting[/13]. The music is loud, but children in the cinema seemed to enjoy that. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: I saw the new adventure film last night. The story is simple, and older viewers may guess the ending quite early. Some of the jokes also feel a little old-fashioned.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: However, the young actor who plays the main character is excellent and makes even quiet scenes interesting. The music is loud, but children in the cinema seemed to enjoy that. Please check the information carefully and speak to a member of staff if anything is still unclear, especially if your plans have changed today.

questions.question: What does the reviewer praise about the film?
questions.explanation: The reviewer says the young actor who plays the main character is excellent.
